message:
feat(hooks): V3 ReasoningBank guidance system with CLI

- Implement ReasoningBank with AgentDB vector storage (no JSON)
- Add GuidanceProvider for Claude-visible output generation
- Create CLI entry point for hooks guidance system
- Add security checks: block .env files, dangerous commands
- Add agent routing with historical performance tracking
- Build TypeScript and verify compilation

Commands available:
  session-context - Output project context for SessionStart hook
  user-prompt     - Analyze prompt and inject relevant guidance
  pre-edit        - Validate and guide before file edit
  pre-command     - Risk assessment for bash commands
  route           - Suggest optimal agent for task

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
